name: Mental Health and Substance Use Substudy
description: Data collected from 3361 men and women living with and without HIV at all 13 sites 57 years old (range 18-97 yrs) median age. This data can help researchers learn more about How common mental health disorders are; How common substance use disorders are; Relationship between behavioral and physical health conditions; How behavioral health disorders affect HIV treatment and outcomes as people age

isBasedOn.name: DataCollection Generation Process in the NIAID Data Ecosystem
isBasedOn.description: How this MWCCS Study Subjects DataCollection Record was generated for the NIAID Data Ecosystem.

step: Step 1. Use a crawler to download the Substudy visual summary pdfs
Step 2: Parse the relevant information directly from each pdf
Step 3: Calculate sampleSize information based on the provided percentages in the pdf
Step 4. Fill in manually curated fields from the MWCCS resource catalog record such as 'usageInfo', 'license', 'topicCategory', 'conditionsOfAccess', 'about'.
